clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Hey <@1470535246842826852>,

I completely understand the issue. It is impossible to run an in-person estimate without the full street address.

To solve this, I am going into the system right now to add a new step to our lead form. From now on, leads will be required to type in their full physical address before their appointment can be confirmed.

For the appointments that were already booked (like Michael's), please give them a quick call today just to grab their house number while I get this new field added to the form.

I'm updating the form right now and will let you know the second it is live!

clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content: After you meet with the customer, we recommend you send estimates however you normally do. After you meet with them in person, we recommend you take it out of our systems, because the main goal of what we built is to get you meeting with people - after you meet with them it’s on you
